[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 1111111 a
2 1010111 5
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 1100010 3
6 0000001 1
7 1000011 3

01 10 1000000 1
12 21 1000001 2
23 32 0100011 3
34 43 0000011 2
45 54 0010001 2
56 65 0111101 5 match 0
67 76 1010111 5 match 2
70 07 1000110 3

02 20 1100010 3 match 5
13 31 0000001 1 match 6
24 42 1000011 3 match 7
35 53 0100001 2
46 64 1010011 4
57 75 0010101 3
60 06 1100110 4
71 17 1010001 3

03 30 0100010 2
14 41 1010001 3
25 52 0100001 2
36 63 0100011 3
47 74 1010011 4
50 05 0100100 2
61 16 1011001 4
72 27 1000011 3 match 7

04 40 1000010 2
15 51 0011001 3
26 62 1100011 4
37 73 0000011 2
